ddls:
CREATE TABLE "state_scores" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* The year for which the scores are recorded */,
  "participation_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students participating in standardized tests */,
  "english_score" TEXT /* Average score in English */,
  "math_score" TEXT /* Average score in Math */,
  "reading_score" TEXT /* Average score in Reading */,
  "science_score" TEXT /* Average score in Science */,
  "composite_score" TEXT /* Composite score based on all subjects */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students who took the tests in each state */,
  "student_growth" TEXT /* Year-over-year growth in student performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_averages" (
  "average_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the national average record */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* The year for which the national averages are recorded */,
  "participation_rate" TEXT /* National average participation rate */,
  "english_score" TEXT /* National average score in English */,
  "math_score" TEXT /* National average score in Math */,
  "reading_score" TEXT /* National average score in Reading */,
  "science_score" TEXT /* National average score in Science */,
  "composite_score" TEXT /* National average composite score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students who took the test */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score achieved in the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_scores ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_scores ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation rate record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* The year for which the participation rates are recorded */,
  "participation_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students participating in standardized tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_scores ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* The state to which the school belongs */,
  "district" TEXT /* The school district */,
  "type" TEXT /* The type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_scores ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* The school the student attends */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* The state where the student took the test */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* The subject in which the student was tested */,
  "score" TEXT /* The student's score */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_scores ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* The role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
